violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles and vents were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee with gloved hands touching his hat, and hair and he did not change gloves before continuing food preparation.
